testcase.name: validateJsonWithSchema should return errors for missing required fields()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle unknown primitive type with fallback()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle enum collections()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle nested objects()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle mutable collections()
validateJsonWithSchema should validate correct JSON()
JsonString should validate JSON on creation()
JsonString should handle various JSON types()
generateSchemaJsonObject should create schema for simple types()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle collections with all numeric types()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle collections()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle collections with custom data class items()
generate Schema()
generateJsonSchema should handle required fields correctly()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle enums()
generateJsonSchema should create valid schema for simple data class()
jacksonObjectMapper should have correct configuration()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle collections with Boolean items()
validateJsonWithSchema should return errors for invalid JSON()
generateJsonSchema should handle title and description annotations()
json instance should have correct configuration()
generateSchemaJsonObject should handle Set with custom data class items()
